---
name: New data source
about: Suggest a news feed, market data API, or signal source to add
title: '[DATA] '
labels: data-source
assignees: ''
---

**Source name and URL**
e.g. "Bank of Canada — https://www.bankofcanada.ca/rss"

**What category does it fit?**
- [ ] market
- [ ] central_bank
- [ ] macro
- [ ] geopolitical
- [ ] ai

**Is it free?**
Yes / No / Free tier available

**Geographic location** (for Signal Globe placement)
City, Country: e.g. Ottawa, Canada — lat 45.42, lng -75.70

**Why should Fred include it?**
What signal value does this source add that existing sources don't cover?

**Have you tested the RSS feed?**
Paste a sample entry or confirm feedparser can parse it.
